summary: Verified home screen i18n translations for EN, DE, EL. All 32 translation keys used in home.tsx are present in all three language files. Code review confirms all home screen UI strings use t() function properly with correct interpolation syntax for dynamic values.

minor.issue: Web login shows 'Request failed' - 404 error. Backend API works via curl. Known issue from iteration_14.

integration_issues.issue: Login via browser UI fails with 'Request failed' but works via curl API. Users may need to use Google OAuth or mobile app.

home_screen_keys_verified: home.sharePrompt - EN: 'Share what's happening today' / DE: 'Teile, was heute passiert' / EL: 'Μοιράσου τι συμβαίνει σήμερα'
home.createPost - EN: 'Create post' / DE: 'Beitrag erstellen' / EL: 'Δημιουργία δημοσίευσης'
home.latestPosts - EN: 'Latest posts' / DE: 'Neueste Beiträge' / EL: 'Τελευταίες δημοσιεύσεις'
common.likes - EN: 'Likes' / DE: 'Gefällt mir' / EL: 'Μου αρέσει'
home.eventsCalendar - EN: 'Events calendar' / DE: 'Veranstaltungskalender' / EL: 'Ημερολόγιο εκδηλώσεων'
home.eventsOn - EN: 'Events on {{date}}' / DE: 'Veranstaltungen am {{date}}' / EL: 'Εκδηλώσεις στις {{date}}'
home.upcomingEvents - EN: 'Upcoming Events' / DE: 'Kommende Veranstaltungen' / EL: 'Προσεχείς εκδηλώσεις'
home.addComment - EN: 'Add a comment' / DE: 'Kommentar hinzufügen' / EL: 'Προσθήκη σχολίου'
home.editPost - EN: 'Edit post' / DE: 'Beitrag bearbeiten' / EL: 'Επεξεργασία δημοσίευσης'
home.saveChanges - EN: 'Save changes' / DE: 'Änderungen speichern' / EL: 'Αποθήκευση αλλαγών'
home.deletePost - EN: 'Delete post' / DE: 'Beitrag löschen' / EL: 'Διαγραφή δημοσίευσης'

action_items: RESOLVED: All home.tsx translations properly implemented for EN, DE, EL
Known issue: Web login not working but backend API works - consider fixing for web users
critical_code_review_comments: All 32 home screen translation keys verified present in en.json, de.json, el.json
Interpolation syntax {{name}} and {{date}} used correctly in all language files
TextInput placeholders properly translated using t() function
Dynamic greeting with user name interpolation implemented correctly

success_rate.frontend: Login page 100%, Home screen translations code-verified 100%

context_for_next_testing_agent: Home screen translations fully implemented and verified via code review. Login page translations work correctly in all 3 languages (verified via Playwright). Web login still has issues but backend works. Focus next testing on other screens that may still have hardcoded strings.
testing_methodology: Due to web login issues, used code review approach to verify all t() calls in home.tsx match keys in translation files. Login page was tested via Playwright UI to confirm language switching works.
